en: You're just too good to be true.
ja: 君は信じられないくらい素敵だ
vi: Ban tuyet voi den muc kho tin

en: Can't take my eyes off of you?
zhTW: 無法把目光從你身上移開
vi: Khong the roi mat khoi ban

en: You'd be like heaven to touch.
ja: 君に触れたら天国みたいだろう
zhTW: 觸碰你一定像天堂一樣
vi: Cham vao ban chac nhu thien duong

en: I wanna hold you so much.
ja: 君をぎゅっと抱きしめたい
vi: Toi muon om ban that chat

en: At long last love has arrived.
ja: ついに愛がやってきた
vi: Cuoi cung tinh yeu da den

en: And I thank God I'm alive.
ja: 生きていることを神に感謝する
vi: Toi cam on Chua vi toi con song

en: You're just too good to be true.
ja: 君は信じられないくらい素敵だ
vi: Ban tuyet voi den muc kho tin

en: Can't take my eyes off of you?
zhTW: 無法把目光從你身上移開
vi: Khong the roi mat khoi ban

ja: 君が必要なんだ、ベイビー

vi: Trong dem co don co em

en: Trust in me when I say.
zhTW: 當我說的時候請相信我
vi: Hay tin toi khi toi noi
